category_sources: source_facts.description says it automatically fixes PHP coding standards issues.
display_name_sources: Official cs.symfony.com site and GitHub organization use PHP CS Fixer.
docs_sources: Official PHP CS Fixer documentation is hosted at cs.symfony.com/doc.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/PHP-CS-Fixer/PHP-CS-Fixer; repo intentionally not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable name php-cs-fixer identify a PHP coding-standards fixer CLI.
